overall.description: A nighttime stroll through a futuristic cyberpunk city waterfront district. The third-person camera follows a female character with blonde hair as she walks from a neon-lit covered promenade past the 'OLIV' store, through an open plaza with digital advertising kiosks, and finally sits on a bench overlooking a canal with the city lights reflecting on the water. The footage exhibits high-fidelity game engine rendering with ray-traced reflections and neon lighting typical of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered luxury shopping promenade with neon storefronts

events.description: character stops adjusting hair and begins walking forward along the promenade
moving away from the immediate OLIV storefront into the wider covered walkway

agents.ego_description: character stands near the OLIV store adjusting her hair and looking around, then begins walking down the covered promenade

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt standing near the storefront looking at window displays
pedestrian in red shirt walking away from camera down the promenade

entered.detail: luxury home accessory store with illuminated 'OLIV' signage and cyan neon accent lighting along the base
overhead roof structure with linear fluorescent lighting creating a tunnel-like effect
large vertical digital screen displaying red and white advertisements with animated content
continuous cyan LED strip running along the base of the storefront window reflecting on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with the character standing in a covered neon-lit promenade outside the OLIV luxury store. The camera orbits around her as she adjusts her hair, then follows as she begins walking down the walkway. Other pedestrians are visible in the distance, and the cyan neon lighting creates a distinct cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with illuminated advertising kiosks

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into the open waterfront plaza with view of the canal
character turns slightly toward the waterfront while continuing to walk past yellow advertising structures

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily along the promenade toward the waterfront, passing illuminated advertising kiosks and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shirt walking in the same direction along the waterfront
pedestrian in white shirt walking away from the water toward the covered area

entered.detail: metal and glass railing separating the walkway from the water with vertical light posts
illuminated yellow rectangular structure with digital advertisements on multiple sides
dark water reflecting the city lights and neon signs from surrounding buildings
futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows and neon signage against the night sky

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the covered walkway into an open waterfront plaza. Yellow advertising kiosks line the path, and the canal becomes visible to the right with the city skyline in the background. The lighting shifts from enclosed artificial neon to a mix of ambient city light and street lamps.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront seating area overlooking the canal with bridge views

events.description: character approaches a wooden bench and sits down facing the water next to another person
camera briefly obscured by the character's head as she sits down on the bench

agents.ego_description: character sits on a waterfront bench next to another person with blue hair, looking out over the canal toward the illuminated bridge

notable_agents.action: person with bright blue hair sitting on the bench looking at the water

entered.detail: simple wooden bench facing the waterfront where the character sits down
illuminated signage for 'LAMAIN' boutique with purple lighting
suspension bridge with strings of warm yellow lights spanning the canal

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the waterfront railing and sits on a wooden bench next to a person with blue hair. The camera settles behind them, showing the view of the illuminated bridge spanning the canal and the distant city lights. The scene ends with both figures sitting and observing the nighttime waterfront view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, neon-lit promenade into an expansive open-air waterfront plaza. It begins with the camera orbiting the character outside the OLIV luxury store under cyan lighting before following her as she walks down the covered walkway. As she leaves the enclosure, the scene opens into a wide plaza lined with yellow advertising kiosks, where the lighting shifts from artificial neon to a blend of ambient city glow and street lamps. The camera then tracks her toward the water's edge, passing the canal and the distant skyline before settling behind her as she sits on a wooden bench next to another person. Finally, the view expands to reveal an illuminated bridge spanning the canal and the shimmering lights of the city reflecting on the water.
